integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.purpose: Determine which provisional evidence must remain available through close for a task-specific non-focus invoice population. This diagnostic does not change retained charges, booked certified amounts, ledger dispositions, original invoice routes, or graph containment.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.population: The eligible population contains every original retained-row invoice except an invoice having at least one retained logical charge in decision_charge_ids or on a lane in focus_lane_ids. Every retained logical charge of an eligible invoice contributes once.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.source_dependency: An invoice is source-dependent when at least one retained logical charge exists only in a PROVISIONAL source snapshot; losing provisional source evidence would remove that business charge.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.fx_comparison_dependency: An invoice is FX-comparison-dependent when at least one of its valid included non-USD retained charges has both same-service-date CERTIFIED and PROVISIONAL public FX rates. CERTIFIED remains the booked rate; PROVISIONAL preserves comparison evidence.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.action_assignment: ARCHIVE_PROVISIONAL_EVIDENCE has neither dependency; RETAIN_FX_COMPARISON_ONLY has only FX-comparison dependency; RETAIN_SOURCE_AND_FX_COMPARISON has both; RETAIN_SOURCE_ONLY has only source dependency.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.source_control_application: Apply the same established Asteria source_control_code used for retained-source decisions to every retained charge in each action cohort. Report the complete SB-24, SB-61, SB-79 distribution in code order, including zeros.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.ledger_control_application: Apply the same established Asteria ledger_disposition_code used for charge decisions to every retained charge in each action cohort. Report the complete LD-14, LD-31, LD-53, LD-72, LD-88 distribution in code order, including zeros.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.booked_measure: valid_charge_count and certified_booked_spend_usd use the ordinary valid included population. Convert every currency, including USD, with the same-service-date CERTIFIED public rate and use the same per-charge cent rounding as normalized_totals.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.source_risk_measure: source_dependent_charge_count counts retained charges that exist only in a PROVISIONAL source snapshot. For invoice priority, certified_booked_spend_at_source_risk_usd sums the ordinary certified-booked amounts of the valid source-dependent charges.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.fx_measure: fx_comparison_charge_count counts qualifying valid dual-rate charges. provisional_fx_comparison_delta_usd sums each charge's cent-rounded PROVISIONAL amount minus cent-rounded CERTIFIED amount, then rounds to 2 decimals.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.priority_measure: For each evidence-sensitive invoice, evidence_priority_usd equals certified_booked_spend_at_source_risk_usd plus provisional_fx_comparison_delta_usd, rounded to 2 decimals.
integrated_close_evidence_release_assess.priority_selection: Within each non-archive action cohort, report its three highest evidence_priority_usd invoices, ordered descending with invoice_id ascending as the tie-break. cohort_rank restarts at 1. Output cohorts in action_cohorts order with the archive cohort omitted.

invoice_routing_policy.population: Retained logical charges grouped by the retained row's invoice_id.
invoice_routing_policy.block_quarantine_rule: Use BLOCK_QUARANTINE when an invoice contains at least one quarantined logical charge.
invoice_routing_policy.review_mismatch_rule: Otherwise use REVIEW_MISMATCH when an invoice contains at least one valid included charge whose recognized service class differs from its expected service class.

unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.purpose: Contain conflicts induced by the union of two explicitly unsafe charge business keys. The graph, labels, and isolated invoice sets are counterfactual controls and do not replace charge_id, invoice_id, retained-source, ledger, route, or certified-FX decisions in the actual close.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.node_population: One node for every distinct retained-row invoice_id. Every retained logical charge contributes once to its original invoice node, using the retained row's public fields.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.scenario_edge_rule: Within each scenario, connect two distinct invoice nodes when each contains at least one retained charge with the same complete unsafe key. Count a direct unordered invoice pair once within a scenario even if it shares several keys. A collision key is a distinct complete key represented in at least two invoice nodes.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.union_rule: The unsafe union graph contains every node and the set union of both scenarios' direct unordered invoice pairs. Count an overlapping pair once in the union and once in overlapping_direct_pair_count.

source_stability_labels.SOURCE_FRAGILE: The invoice contains at least one retained logical charge whose source_treatment is RETAIN_PROVISIONAL_ONLY, so deleting the provisional source snapshot would remove a charge.
source_stability_labels.SOURCE_STABLE: The invoice contains no retained logical charge whose source_treatment is RETAIN_PROVISIONAL_ONLY.

fx_stability_labels.FX_SENSITIVE: The invoice contains at least one valid included non-USD retained charge for which both CERTIFIED and PROVISIONAL public FX rates exist for the charge's service_date and currency, so deleting provisional FX evidence would remove a dual-rate comparison.
fx_stability_labels.FX_INSENSITIVE: The invoice contains no such qualifying dual-rate charge.

unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.population_impact_rule: For the named invoice population, count all retained charges and report source treatments as CERTIFIED_ONLY for RETAIN_CERTIFIED_ONLY, CERTIFIED_OVERLAP for RETAIN_CERTIFIED_OVERLAP, and PROVISIONAL_ONLY for RETAIN_PROVISIONAL_ONLY. valid_charge_count and valid_spend_usd are the contribution of those invoices to the ordinary valid included population and normalized_totals.total_spend_usd. Apply that same numerical treatment: convert every currency, including USD, with its same-service-date CERTIFIED public usd_per_unit rate, round each charge to cents, then sum and round to 2 decimals. fx_affected_charge_count and fx_counterfactual_increase_usd use the same qualifying non-USD dual-rate population as fx_certification_counterfactual, with per-charge cent rounding before aggregation.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.stage_contract: The stages are state transitions in the listed order. The first stage's active population is the full node population; every later stage's active population excludes all invoice nodes isolated by earlier stages. A stage conflict graph is the induced unsafe-union graph on its active population restricted to direct edges whose endpoint labels differ for that stage. The required isolation set is a minimum-cardinality vertex cover of that stage conflict graph. Report the selected IDs ascending and measure isolated_population_impact only on that stage's selected cover.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.minimum_vertex_cover_tie_break: If several minimum-cardinality vertex covers exist, sort the invoice IDs within every candidate cover ascending and select the candidate whose resulting ID array is lexicographically smallest under ordinary string comparison. This is a global result tie-break and does not prescribe an optimization algorithm.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.final_component_rule: After both covers are removed, compute undirected connected components of the induced unsafe-union graph over all remaining nodes, including singleton components. Report the complete histogram keyed by source_stability_label, fx_stability_label, and invoice_count_per_component. A mixed-label component has more than one value of that label.
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.final_signature_order: source_stability_label ascending, then fx_stability_label ascending, then invoice_count_per_component ascending
unsafe_aggregation_containment_plan.stable_id_order: Every reported invoice-ID array is sorted ascending.

invoice_route_ledger_control_audit.population: Every retained logical charge, grouped by its invoice's final route.
invoice_route_ledger_control_audit.assignment_rule: Apply the same established Asteria ledger disposition control used for charge decisions to every retained logical charge. Each charge contributes once to exactly one control count.
invoice_route_ledger_control_audit.output_order: invoice_route ascending; ledger_disposition_code ascending; include zero counts.

fx_certification_counterfactual.population: Valid included non-USD logical charges for which both a CERTIFIED and a PROVISIONAL public FX rate exist for the retained charge's service_date and currency.
fx_certification_counterfactual.certified_measure: Convert each qualifying retained amount with the same-date CERTIFIED usd_per_unit rate and round the charge result to 2 decimal places.
fx_certification_counterfactual.provisional_measure: Convert the same retained amount with the same-date PROVISIONAL usd_per_unit rate and round the charge result to 2 decimal places.
fx_certification_counterfactual.aggregation_rule: Sum the cent-rounded charge results, then round each reported total to 2 decimal places.
fx_certification_counterfactual.carrier_ranking_population: The same qualifying valid charges, grouped by carrier_id.
fx_certification_counterfactual.control_application: Apply the established training-time reference control to each rate status, the established source control to certified-over-provisional evidence selection, and the established ledger disposition control to every qualifying valid charge. The control meanings are intentionally not repeated here.
fx_certification_counterfactual.ledger_distribution_order: ledger_disposition_code ascending; include only controls represented in the valid qualifying population.
